flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Central Georgia Technical College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.0k → $3.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Central Georgia Technical College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.4k → $6.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Central Georgia Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Central Georgia Technical College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (5.5k → 6.2k).
